expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: supporting issues stay context_only_no_defect_analysis and produce summaries
expectations.evidence: The run output explicitly states the case focus but does not demonstrate it with produced artifacts: result.md says "Not demonstrable with the provided evidence" for both (1) context_only_no_defect_analysis routing and (2) summaries, and notes missing Phase 1 artifacts such as "phase1_spawn_manifest.json", "context/supporting_issue_relation_map_<feature-id>.md", and "context/supporting_issue_summary_*". It also cites adjacent issues evidence showing "support_signal_issue_keys: []".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The output cannot confirm Phase 1 alignment because Phase 1 artifacts are missing. result.md states: "there is no Phase 1 output artifact (e.g., phase1_spawn_manifest.json) to confirm Phase 1 alignment or validation behavior." execution_notes.md similarly reports: "No Phase 1 run directory artifacts were provided in the fixture bundle" and concludes the case is "not verifiable".
